'''Riv Shiel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
During Riv Shiel's early career as a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], he was mistaken by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] for the wanted [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] rebel, [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]]. The soldiers attacked Shiel, who killed them. His act of self-defense earned Shiel a death mark that he would carry for the rest of his life.

When [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] reformed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Shiel applied for membership in the elite unit. His simulator scores were good enough to earn him a place on the roster and he was paired with [[Gavin Darklighter]].

Shiel was instrumental in the Rogues' fight against the former head of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]], who had taken the leadership of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He participated in the [[Commando/Legends|commando]] operation that resulted in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|capture]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and he resigned his commission, along with the rest of his [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], to assist the [[Ashern]] Rebels in the fight against Isard on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

Shiel was killed during a raid on three [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] tankers when the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter/Legends|''Corrupter'']], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ait Convarion]], ambushed the squadron. Convarion opened fire three seconds after reversion to real space, destroying the tanker that Gavin Darklighter, Shiel and two [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Chir'daki|Death Seed]] pilots were escorting, killing Riv and the Twi'leks and damaging Gavin's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].
